name: Day 5- The Ạ̸̓͂̐͠ǹ̵̨̥̩̮͇̽̕g̷͓͓͙̓̔͑̽̆̈̄̎ę̵̖͍̾͛̍̀͒l̸̢̺̙̳̙̯͎̂̉̾̇̑͝͝
description:
Ageless, nameless, faceless. That's how angels are, until they fall. Of course, you'd not know that, would you little lamb?

Your family was silly enough to join a cult, but you never really fit in huh? Always stubborn, always questioning the all powerful Angel.

But now that you're here, the Leader leading it won't ever let you leave. None of his flock may stray, lest the wolves attack. But what if he's both shepherd and wolf?

DUMBIFICATION, Power imbalance, Cult-y Stuff, Potential Non/Dubcon.

He came out a little more uh, corruption-y. So I promise to make another dumbification bot in the future.

Sorry he's a lil late, I got the early release of Silent Hill :)
creator: Sammiefy
